project_type: Next.js 15 App Router monorepo - grocery shopping PWA
build_system: turbo monorepo, next build with prisma generate prerequisite. Prisma requires DATABASE_URL env var.
test_framework: tsx --test for unit tests, playwright for E2E
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ - expect 0 errors. 2. Run npm run test from apps/web/. 3. Build will fail without DATABASE_URL for prisma generate - that is expected.
environment_constraints: Network available for npm install. Build requires DATABASE_URL for prisma generate which is not available - use lint and AST validation instead. No Docker daemon assumed.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENTS.md design system strictly. One accent (green). No emoji. Lucide icons only. rounded-full for controls, rounded-2xl for cards. Manrope 900 headings. Inter Tight body. No window scroll listeners. No h-screen. max-w-7xl. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. CSS grid over flex percentage math.
key_patterns: Components use 'use client' directive. Motion tokens from lib/motion.ts. GSAP from lib/gsap.ts. Cart state via cart-provider with isolated re-render pattern. ThemeProvider from next-themes with class strategy. iOS-safe positioning with CSS custom properties. Framer Motion AnimatePresence for enter/exit. haptic() utility for tactile feedback.
directory_structure: Monorepo root: turbo.json, apps/web/ is main app. apps/web/app/ = App Router pages. apps/web/components/ = shared components. apps/web/lib/ = utilities, motion tokens, gsap setup. apps/web/tests/ = unit tests.
